title: AutoRestart
description: server-side mod for auto server restart
body:
AutoRestart Scheduler is a lightweight yet powerful mod for automatically restarting your Minecraft server on a set schedule. It also allows administrators to manually trigger a restart via command. With built-in support for both English and Russian, it's ideal for international server communities.
🔧 Features
- ⏰ Scheduled Auto-Restarts
- 🔁 Manual Restart Command
    Use /restart to immediately initiate a server restart.
